subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Muhammad! We beseech God, blessed and exalted be He, that He may aid thee to be patient and steadfast in that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد نسئل الله تبارک و تعالی ان یویدکم علی الصبر و الاصطبار فیما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
